(h) "You" or "Your" means the licensee in terms of this agreement.

The use of any Product Identity in Open Game Content does not constitute a challenge to the ownership of that Product Identity. The owner of any Product Identity used in Open Game Content shall retain all rights, title and interest in and to that Product Identity.

 **8. Identification**: If you distribute Open Game Content You must clearly indicate which portions of the work that you are distributing are Open Game Content.

stat_block.craft_requirements: Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

abilities.effect: You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: This bizarre staff is made from oak, capped with a cluster of eye-shaped gemstones that seem to move and undulate at the corner of your vision. While wielding the staff, you can peer through the eyes, using your normal visual senses (including any benefits of spells affecting your vision, like *see invisibility*). You can maneuver the staff to see things around corners, at higher elevations, or in places where the staff can fit but your head can't. This doesn't provide sufficient line of effect to target creatures around corners. The eyes are as vulnerable as your eyes and can be affected by anything that alters your vision, such as a blinding flash of light.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Illusion
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the illusion school of magic, typically involving false sensory stimuli.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text:
Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. A magical item radiates a magic aura infused with its dominant school of magic.  
  
 Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.

variants.name: Staff of Impossible Visions
variants.text:
* Cantrip daze
* 1st fear, phantom pain
* 2nd augury, paranoia

variants.name: Staff of Impossible Visions (Greater)
variants.text:
* 3rd hypnotic pattern, paralyze
* 4th countless eyes, phantasmal killer
* 5th strange geometry

variants.name: Staff of Impossible Visions (Major)
variants.text:
* 6th blinding fury, phantasmal calamity
* 7th visions of danger, warp mind

variants.name: Staff of Impossible Visions (True)
variants.text:
* 8th spirit song, uncontrollable dance
* 9th unfathomable song, weird
